title: Review: core round 19
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — Three groups of unbounded deserialization fields remain in ClearMessage enum variants (PeerDeliver aux fields, PeerTyping/PeerRetract, PaymentAction strings). Only authenticated MLS group members can trigger them, reducing severity. Pattern of bounded guards established but not applied consistently.
Confidence: 15% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty: openmls internals not reviewed; hpke crate API. Would raise if openmls audited and nie-qgag.3 fixed.
